hypothesis: Continual pre-training of a 2B-parameter language model on MOF-specific literature combined with large PubChem SMILES corpora will enable the model, when fine-tuned on MOFid-to-property datasets using only MOFid text inputs, to predict MOF band gaps and gas adsorption properties with significantly lower MAE than models without such pre-training (including CGCNN, SOAP, and MOFormer), with the performance advantage increasing in low fine-tuning data regimes.
